# Data Sources

Downloaded 2026-03-09. All materials are from publicly available South Portland government sources.

## Sources

- **School Board website:** https://www.spsdme.org/page/school-board
- **FY27 Budget page:** https://www.spsdme.org/budget27
- **FY26 Budget page:** https://www.spsdme.org/budget26
- **SPC-TV Vimeo channel:** https://vimeo.com/spctv
- **City Council (BoardDocs):** https://go.boarddocs.com/me/sport/Board.nsf/Public (inactive from March 2026)
- **City Council (Diligent Community):** https://southportland-gov.community.diligentoneplatform.com/Portal/MeetingInformation.aspx

## Upcoming Meetings (as of March 9, 2026)

- March 9, 2026 -- Regular Board Meeting (tonight), 6 PM, SPHS Lecture Hall
- March 16, 2026 -- Open Conversation with District Leadership, 6 PM, SPHS Learning Commons
- March 23, 2026 -- Budget Workshop II, 6 PM, Redbank Community Center
- March 30, 2026 -- Budget Workshop III, 6 PM, SPHS Lecture Hall
- April 14, 2026 -- City Council Budget Workshop #1, 6:30 PM, Council Chambers

## Notes

- Transcripts are Vimeo auto-generated (VTT format). Quality varies; expect errors with proper nouns and technical terms.
- Video recordings are available at `https://vimeo.com/{VIMEO_ID}` for each meeting.
- The FY27 budget (2026-2027 school year) is the one currently under development, facing an $8.4M shortfall with ~80 proposed position cuts.
